race.description: The Royal Hotel Muswellbrook Showcase Bm 66 Handicap
race.comment: ANTILOCAPRA (8) consistent gelding who hasn't been that far away in stronger company. Closed late for an unlucky fourth over 1350m at Beaumont (Newcastle) in a BM66. Trip suits and can launch late off a good tempo. ATHENA'S TREASURE (5) going nicely through her grades and gives the impression this trip will suit. Strong through the line with an improved second over 1250m at Newcastle in BM68 class. Maps well with fitness on her side. IVY DIVA (10) trained locally and this looks a target race on her home track. Snagged back from the wide gate when she produced a solid set of figures to secure fourth over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Strong winning chance who can run a touch closer. FLAMBOYANT LAD (3) second run for the new yard with a poor eighth over 1250m at Newcastle. Covered a stack of ground last start and gets the gun run today. Each way. OFF THE SCALE (6) will find this short of her best but the recent trial win over 1200m suggests she's come back in good order.
